blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,518 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.8" of snow, highs of 29°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 38".
